source.rule: This registry is the machine-readable source for current marketing visuals. Historical Drive folders are excluded.

selection_rules: Select by asset_key, never by guessed filename.
Use a source whose mode matches the post mode unless an approved contrast is intentional.
Prefer product proof for product claims and landing composites for brand or acquisition claims.
The real logo must be selected through an approved brand_logo asset.
Use module_* assets only as real detail zooms paired with a coherent mobile_* parent screen.
The first selected asset is context; the second module_* asset is a truthful zoom, never invented UI or a generic text card.
